basic_details.job_title: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Assistant, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR), Cuttack
basic_details.short_information: SVNIRTAR is recruiting experienced faculty members for its Composite Regional Centres to strengthen rehabilitation services across the North East region.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be intimated to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: M. Sc. (Sp. & Hg.) / MASLP / equivalent. 8 years of teaching experience at graduate or post graduate level. Minimum of 5 publications with cumulative impact factor of 5. Valid RCI Registration. M.Phil. in Clinical or Rehabilitation Psychology (Full time course recognized by RCI). Minimum 8 years experience in teaching/research in related field. Valid RCI Registration. | Desirable for all posts: Ph.D. in core areas and experience of running undergraduate training programmes.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Speech Pathologist / Audiologist Gr- II (Speech & Hearing) (Consultant)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Speech Pathologist / Audiologist Gr- II (Speech & Hearing) (Consultant)

selection_process: Screening of applications Shortlisting based on eligibility and experience Interview / Presentation Document Verification Final Selection by competent authority
how_to_apply: Download the detailed advertisement and application format from the official SVNIRTAR website.
Submit the application as per the instructions given in the detailed advertisement (by post/email).
important_instructions: Positions are purely on contract basis and co-terminus with the requirement. Selected candidates will work under the administrative control of SVNIRTAR. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage.

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Associate Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: SVNIRTAR has released the official recruitment notice for engagement of Associate Professors (Consultant) on contract basis. The notification includes complete details on posts, essential qualifications, desirable qualifications, remuneration, age limit, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download SVNIRTAR Associate Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Associate Professor Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: SVNIRTAR is recruiting experienced faculty members for its Composite Regional Centres to strengthen rehabilitation services across the North East region.

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Associate Professor Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M. Sc. (Sp. & Hg.) / MASLP / equivalent. 8 years of teaching experience at graduate or post graduate level. Minimum of 5 publications with cumulative impact factor of 5. Valid RCI Registration. M.Phil. in Clinical or Rehabilitation Psychology (Full time course recognized by RCI). Minimum 8 years experience in teaching/research in related field. Valid RCI Registration. Desirable for all posts: Ph.D. in core areas and experience of running undergraduate training programmes.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Shortlisting based on eligibility and experience Interview / Presentation Document Verification Final Selection by competent authority

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for SVNIRTAR Candidates
content_sections.text: Positions are purely on contract basis and co-terminus with the requirement. Selected candidates will work under the administrative control of SVNIRTAR. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. How many Associate Professor vacancies are announced by SVNIRTAR in 2026?
faq.answer: Total 02 vacancies – one each at CRCSRE Guwahati and CRCSRE Shillong.

faq.question: Q2. What is the monthly remuneration for Associate Professor (Consultant) at SVNIRTAR?
faq.answer: ₹80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for SVNIRTAR Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: 56 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Associate Professor (Speech Language Pathology & Audiology)?
faq.answer: M.Sc. (Sp. & Hg.)/MASLP + 8 years teaching experience + 5 publications + Valid RCI Registration.

faq.question: Q5. Is Ph.D. mandatory for SVNIRTAR Associate Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, Ph.D. is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to apply for SVNIRTAR Recruitment Notice?
faq.answer: Check the detailed advertisement on the official website for the exact last date.

faq.question: Q7. For which locations are the Associate Professor posts available?
faq.answer: CRCSRE Guwahati (Speech Language Pathology) and CRCSRE Shillong (Clinical Psychology).

faq.question: Q8. Is RCI Registration compulsory for these positions?
faq.answer: Yes, valid RCI Registration is essential for both posts.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of engagement for SVNIRTAR Associate Professor?
faq.answer: Purely on contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Which ministry controls SVNIRTAR Institute?
faq.answer: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan), Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India.
